hooks.prompt: Review what was done in this session for the broker-orch project. If any new patterns, conventions, or reusable knowledge emerged (e.g., new broker integration patterns, MCP bridge patterns, deployment steps, debugging techniques), update the relevant files in .claude/rules/, .claude/skills/, or .claude/agents/. Only update if there is genuinely new, project-specific knowledge — do not add duplicates. Keep files concise and actionable.
